subject: feat(auth): surface bypass state in AppLayout
body:
Show a red top banner while AUTH_BYPASS_ENABLED is on so visitors and
reviewers can immediately see the app is unsecured, and hide the Sign
out button since it is a no-op under bypass.

Tags: auth, ui, dev
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: dev-auth-bypass
Semver: patch
